objective: Approve the CART-S01-T01 verification that the mkdirSync static import fix in src/store/graph.ts resolves CART-B01 and meets all acceptance criteria.
findings: mkdirSync is a top-level static import from 'fs' alongside readFileSync/writeFileSync/existsSync — correct ESM pattern
save() is synchronous with no async/await — consistent with project's offline synchronous persistence model
mkdirSync(dir, {recursive:true}) called before writeFileSync — correct write ordering preserved
src/cli.ts is the sole consumer of graph.ts — no cross-cutting impact from internal fix
No API signature changes — all public exports unchanged, no breaking change
All 3 gates pass independently: build (tsc), test (31 pass incl. CART-B01 regression guard), lint (0 errors)
No operational impact: no version bump, migration, or security scan required
Known debt remains: no concurrency safety on read-modify-write in load/save cycle
Unused production dependencies (lowdb, enquirer) should be pruned in a future sprint
eslint not declared in devDependencies despite being used in lint script
key_changes: Architect approved: mkdirSync static import fix verified correct in src/store/graph.ts
